blended.narrative: Smugglers Notch is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours. Looking ahead, 12 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 54°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Friday: 2.0" of snow, highs of 27°F. Expect powder.
Saturday: 2.6" of snow, highs of 26°F. Expect powder.
Sunday: 2.5" of snow, highs of 29°F. Expect variable conditions.
Tuesday: 2.1" of snow, highs of 35°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
